goal: 让 dream 摘要在 heartbeat 预算内失败可跳过

summary.title: 限制 dream 摘要预算
summary.what: 给 agent-memory dream 的 LLM episode summary 增加预算控制：默认每轮最多尝试 2 个 closed thread，总预算 30s，单次调用 10s；dream 输出 summaryGeneration 统计，摘要失败或超过预算时跳过剩余候选但保留 segmentation、thread persistence、cross-surface link 和 dream event 写入。heartbeat 改为通过 HEARTBEAT_DREAM_ARGS 显式调用同一组预算参数。
summary.why: live runtime 显示 full pipeline 的 dream step 在 heartbeat 的 60s spawnSync 窗口里被多 thread 串行 LLM 摘要拖到 ETIMEDOUT，导致 observe 正常但 runtime 长期 unhealthy。Catty v0 需要真实 trail -> dream/episode 这条 memory organ 数据流稳定运行，但不能把高成本模型调用无界塞进 60s heartbeat。
summary.user_goal: 让 dream 摘要在 heartbeat 预算内失败可跳过

decisions.point: 超时问题是在 ops 层提高 heartbeat timeout 还是在 dream 层预算化
decisions.chose: 在 dream 层增加 summary max/budget/timeout，并让 heartbeat 显式传入预算参数。
decisions.rationale: 提高 heartbeat timeout 会扩大低频 full pipeline 的资源风险；预算化让 dream 在固定时间内产生部分进展，符合 runtime plan 的 60s heartbeat 预算。

decisions.point: LLM 摘要失败是否使 dream 整体失败
decisions.chose: 单个 thread 摘要失败只记录 failed 计数和 stderr，不阻断后续持久化与命令退出。
decisions.rationale: episode summary 是增强信息，不应让 trail segmentation、thread 状态、cross-surface link 和 dream event 因单次模型失败全部丢失。

decisions.point: 预算逻辑放在哪里测试
decisions.chose: 新增 src/lib/dream-summary-budget.ts 和 focused test，再由 ops-runtime 的 HEARTBEAT_DREAM_ARGS 测试锁定 heartbeat 参数。
decisions.rationale: 避免继续扩大 src/main.ts monolith，同时让预算边界可以纯函数验证。

rejected.alternative: 把 heartbeat dream timeout 从 60s 调高
rejected.reason: 这会掩盖无界模型摘要，且违背当前 heartbeat 资源预算。

rejected.alternative: dream 遇到任何 LLM 摘要失败就退出非零
rejected.reason: 这会让非关键摘要失败污染整个 memory organ runtime 健康。

rejected.alternative: 把本轮扩展成 Catty prediction/judge 数据采集
rejected.reason: 当前 runtime unhealthy 是更上游阻塞；先稳住 dream/full pipeline，再等待真实 context switch 采样。

review_notes: 验证通过：bun test，99 pass；git diff --check clean；git diff --cached --check clean。

真实 smoke：/usr/bin/time -p bun src/main.ts dream --since-hours 24 --limit 240 --summary-max 2 --summary-budget-ms 30000 --summary-timeout-ms 10000 在 11.36s 返回，summaryGeneration attempted=2 succeeded=2 skipped=3 summary_max_reached。
dry-run smoke：bun src/main.ts dream --since-hours 24 --limit 240 --dry-run 输出 summaryGeneration，dry_run skipped=5。
live status --live 仍显示旧 fullPipeline.lastFailure=dream，因为 full pipeline 尚未到下一次 due；没有手工改 runtime status。
Catty dogfood 仍 blocked/no_user_prior_candidates；shadow 仍 repeated-context，需要等待真实 context switch 后再采样。
提交 fef6f93 只包含本轮 6 个文件；CLAUDE.md 是无关 unstaged dirty，未 stage/commit。

architectural_claims: LLM episode summary is budget-bounded inside dream and is non-critical to the overall dream command success.
Heartbeat full pipeline keeps a 60s command budget and passes explicit dream summary limits instead of increasing the outer timeout.
Budget calculation is isolated in a small lib module rather than deepening src/main.ts logic beyond orchestration.
behavioral_changes: agent-memory dream output and dream event metadata include summaryGeneration with candidates, attempted, succeeded, failed, skipped, skippedReasons, maxAttempts, budgetMs, and timeoutMs.
The heartbeat dream step invokes dream --since-hours 24 --limit 240 --summary-max 2 --summary-budget-ms 30000 --summary-timeout-ms 10000.
Closed thread summaries beyond the budget are skipped with summary_max_reached or summary_budget_exhausted instead of risking a 60s heartbeat timeout.
security_implications: No secret-bearing config files were read or printed.
No user memory is written by this change; dream continues writing normal runtime dream/episode data only.
LLM calls receive a shorter per-call timeout, reducing the chance of long-running provider calls in heartbeat.
migration_notes: Existing dream invocations remain compatible; new flags are optional and default to the heartbeat-safe budget.
